title: Stencil Street Art Style Banksy Silhouette Slouched
sourceTitle: Stencil Street Art Style Banksy Silhouette Slouched
prompt: Stencil street art in the style of Banksy | silhouette of a slouched child sitting on a throne made from stacked smartphones and tablets | rough paper crown on the child’s head | flat black stencil shapes only | broken toys scattered at the base in vivid yellow stencil shapes as the only color accent | spray-painted text reads "IM PAUL" in rough all caps, crooked and dripping | stark, minimal, ironic composition | bold stencil silhouettes with visible spray paint overspray | no gradients, no realism, pure stencil precision --ar 4:5 --v 7
originalPrompt: Stencil street art in the style of Banksy | silhouette of a slouched child sitting on a throne made from stacked smartphones and tablets | rough paper crown on the child’s head | flat black stencil shapes only | broken toys scattered at the base in vivid yellow stencil shapes as the only color accent | spray-painted text reads "IM PAUL" in rough all caps, crooked and dripping | stark, minimal, ironic composition | bold stencil silhouettes with visible spray paint overspray | no gradients, no realism, pure stencil precision --ar 4:5 --v 7
